summary: Refresh: tiers/encounters/metrics fresh, 0 tier moves; Archon numbers 07-14->07-17; no new PTR build; WCL rdps still 500 (5 cuts unreachable, 3 raw series landed); creator transcripts IP-blocked.

sources.detail: All 6 pages (raid+M+, all roles) fetched live via curl and parsed from the table.tier-list rows; era-verified Midnight (12.0.7) / Season 1. 80 specs matched roster exactly (A+ tier present on raid and M+ pages). 0 tier moves vs HEAD — re-verified live this run, stable, not a stale skip.

Both pages fetched live and parsed from tier__tier blocks; era-verified (Devourer present). Raid 39 specs (Vengeance DH still omitted upstream — absence, not error); M+ 40 specs (dungeon-difficulty tier list excluded via roster matching). 0 moves vs HEAD.

All 6 pages fetched via the r.jina.ai proxy and parsed from the numbered ranking lists; era-verified Midnight Season 1. 40+40 specs matched (new render typo 'Restoration Druid(S-Tier)' — missing space before paren — handled). 0 moves vs HEAD.

All 6 raid(throughput)/M+(score) pages parsed from __NEXT_DATA__ specTierListSection; 80 rows matched roster, 0 unmatched; upstream lastUpdated 2026-07-16T12:00Z. 0 tier moves vs HEAD. Precise specRankingsSection numbers also re-merged (152 metric value updates, asOf 07-14->07-17).

Full re-fetch of all 9 raid bosses + 8 M+ dungeons across all 3 roles (51 pages, throughput for raid / score for M+); every encounter parsed 40/40 specs from __NEXT_DATA__. 680 cells, 0 changed vs stored; asOf already 2026-07-17.
40 rows parsed from the survivability tierList across all 3 raid pages and re-merged via apply-metrics survivability key; 0 tier moves vs HEAD — stable.

Raid pages re-checked: still '0 records' upstream — left unranked.

Agent did not re-fetch or edit these rows.

Agent did not re-fetch or edit.

40/40 rows (27 DPS + 7 healer + 6 tank) fetched live via plain GET and parsed for the top-50 avg M+ rating ceiling; era-verified Midnight Season 1. All values byte-identical to the same-day baseline — confirmed stable, not a stale skip.

Augmentation excluded by design.

Period 1072 MID1 (unchanged period; era-verified) parsed from /period/latest 'Spec representation in top keys' — direct per-spec percentages this run; 40/40 specs, sum 100.2. All values byte-identical to the same-day baseline.

Forum thread (Discourse .json) + Wowhead news RSS both checked live. Thread still tops at post #15 (Rogue Outlaw addendum, 07-14) under build #14 already logged — NO new forum build.
